description: AWESOME, every time most friendly and helpful very professional and know their product.
author: Heinrich V.
pros: Helpful, professional and friendly :) What a pleasure dealing with support
cons: nothing, always helpful and sort out problems in a jiffy. A pleasure calling support.

description: Pure joy, I don't give 5* ratings to software lightly. So many things have been considered and applied thoughtfully rather than piecemeal like other software, and they all remain true to the overall design. It's been a pleasure working with [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] who are repsponsive and open to suggestions and I can see many of the suggestions being implemented already. The migration process was easy enough but I think a cheat sheet with what needs to be checked or brought in manually and in what order would help. There was still quite a bit to do to get the system fully setup even though it was functional and online within a few hours and there were things I didn't realise until after I did my first EOM. I would love to see communication with housekeepers/handmen via an app, ability for guests to checkin and sign off electronically (So important with Covid) and maybe an owners portal to access their own reports. But overall I LOVE it!
author: Kirsten B.
pros: Love love love that it is true cloud build and design so I can access it from any browser anywhere. Love that I can have mulitple screens open at once. It is sleek and easy to navigate. Most features are intuitive but when I need help the support from [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] is fast and helpful. Love the idea of the dashboard now I am used to using it. Love that I can text guests and use templates for emails (although the editor needs a little work still :)
cons: All features are there but some need a bit of tewaking to improve efficiency: Calendar - I find it hard to use as it is. Needs more status colours and can't see and letters of the name for 1N bookings; Entering new Direct Bkg not efficient - Need to be able to enter no. of nights from start date rather than start and end date, Guest linkage/lookup not efficient (we need to see any comments about the gust before we confirmt he bkg and in Mooloolaba we REALLY need a blacklist feature); Need ability to enter deposit required amt and manage deposit due date and amount (and link this to calendar status); Need extra info to display next to price (Eg. Rate per night, Discount applied to std rate plan (I have lots more ideas for this)) Inability to change room types and status :( I need to do this often due to owners discretion but it deters me given I have to get [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] to do it for me; Printing and Emailing - there are just too many clicks to be able to print anything. There must be an engine that allows printing in one click with a default printer setup. Need this for receipts, invoices and Checkin Form/letter Sort Order - this appears to be all over the shop. Pls look at display order of charges, agents, rate plans etc. Just make it alphabetical would be easier Housekkeeping - Still missing display of checkin/out status and ability to show back to backs/set priority (otherwise I love it) CHarges - need to change chrgs before C/O Promotions - not able to do promos like stay 5 pay 3
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Sebastian M.
pros: I like the modern layout and style of their interface, and the ease of use when placing and modifying reservations.
cons: Sometimes I will come across features that are missing which would be a great help, but this is very rare.

review_title: It just keeps getting better and better
description: Dont think about it - just do it - I can promise you, you wont regret it.
author: Bridgette S.
pros: Where to start about Resly. It was an amazing product to begin with and it just keeps getting better and better. I am grateful for the instant support from the Resly team. We usually don't have time to wait for responses to queries and that has never been a problem since joining Resly. I love how intuitive the program is and it takes me no time to train newbies and being able to fully access anywhere in the world is brilliant
cons: There is nothing about Resly we don't like. If there is anything we think can make life easier or improvements we can see that can be made, the Rely team are quick to take ideas and suggestions on board.

description: Resly has drastically speed up our trust accounting and provided a solution for running both short and long term accommodation management options for our clients.
author: Shaun C.
pros: While the software is great and is constantly improving the customer service this company offers is second to none and is worth the subscription fee just to have an expert on call. In particular, we have been working with [SENSITIVE CONTENT] from Resly through not only the onboarding phase but as we continue to grow. He knows the software inside out and when thrown curve balls has been able to create creative solutions for us. Would strongly recommend this software for anyone in the short-term letting space.
cons: While the short term letting software is fantastic, the long term letting side could do with some improvements. Speaking to Resly team this does sound link something they are working and I have no doubt they will continue to improve this side of the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: AMAZING!!! Always available to answer a question. Never palmed off to someone else or waiting for a call back.
author: Sue H.
pros: The product and the amazing support from the team made the decision to take on board simple and stress free. The program is user friendly & an easy transition from the old outdated system were were previously using. Being a true cloud based program I can see what is happening from any where in the world on a day by day / hour by hour basis. There is zero stress for relievers - 1 button and EOM is done.
cons: There is nothing to dislike. It offers everything I require to run my business efficiently.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: They have supported us throughout the whole transition from our old system to Resly. The set-up was basically all done by them and they needed very little help from my end. The system is very intuitive and easy to use.
author: Wayne A.
pros: The support we have received this far has been second to none. I like how it is cloud based and I can use it anywhere. It is an all in one system which just makes sense. Very simple to use which reduces my stress.
cons: The only con is that I didn't move sooner!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I never thought switching systems could be so easy
description: The guys made this transition so easy. I am a person who struggles with change but this program is a dream to work with. I like that the guys sit and explain everything in easy to understand step by step manner. The one advise from the guys that made so much sense is. " Ask yourself what are you trying to do, then click on the tab that relates and all else follows logically". It is practical, intuitive and logical with absolutely no clutter or useless tabs.
author: Naomi A.
pros: It is very user friendly. it is definitely cloud ( not just pretending to be).
cons: Nothing at all it is brilliant, easy to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It was a complicated request and they spent time helping me through solving my issues. I had a few steps to process.
author: Christine G.
pros: Excellent help desk service. Very patient and understanding and nothing was too much. It was an pleasant process
cons: Like everything about Resly. I have only every had a good experience with their help desk personnel

description: Great friendly team, great software easy to use
author: Stuart K.
pros: Banking, bookkeeping and easy to use, everything really compared to other booking systems
cons: There is nothing at this stage to say that I like least about Resly

description: Very positive, efficient and helpful staff. Available over the phone for any assistance.
author: Ashim K.
pros: Simple and easy to work one's way through. Very connected with banking and accounting software.
cons: Nothing so far. Still working out a few differences between the old system we were on and Resley.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Have been super happy with changing, it has truly made my life easier. In the management of a small boutique apartment block like Viscount On The Beach, it allows me to not be stuck at the desk. Time - it has given me some extra time!
author: Amber W.
pros: EASE Familiarity Flexibility Portability
cons: Nothing is a con besides my learning capability - I wish I was better at utilising everything that it can do.

description: It is very straight forward. There always help to hand if you need.
author: Lisa S.
pros: It is very clear with each procedure. The step by step is always very clear too. The staff are friendly.
cons: No cons come to mind. I fi have ever had a problem i can call support

description: Having only used the software for 3 weeks, I am very happy thus far. I love the flexibility it offers and am excited to see how we can maximise results going forward.
author: Hamish W.
pros: The support team at Resly, particularly our onboarding support [sensitive content hidden] has been instrumental in providing guidance and assistance throughout the set up and launch post settlement and transition from Hirum. As a first time management rights operator, I found the system's usability and intuitive process so easy to work with.
cons: Not obtaining historical information from previous software Hirum during the data download to compare YOY results.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: You'd be mad not to go with Resly - make your life easier.
author: Chris D.
pros: Resly is by far and away the best in class software for trust accounting. Their ease of use for the trust account balancing makes it far superior to any of the other products out there. The software is smooth, easy to train new employees on and allows for all of the same features as their competitors without the big price tag.
cons: I dont feel as if Resly has any Cons, their support team take on any optimisation feedback and quickly implement

review_title: Simply the best trust accounting platform available. No exceptions.
description: #hearts
author: Nick E.
pros: If I could give Resly support 6 stars I would - they are super responsive, and very very receptive to feature requests. Rate & restrictions management is simple to use and effectively designed - we use multiple PMS's within our group (including premium providers), Resly is by far the best across all in this space...
cons: Reservation management is a little more basic than other systems - but it fits the brief well for our business model (vacation rental)

author: Janelle D.
pros: Simplicity to use and great backup support.
cons: I don't find anything about resly that i don't like.

description: Such an easy take over, amazing support, lovely team to work with, highly recommend to everyone
author: Marion S.
pros: This product is so easy to use, intuitive and simple. Love the support we receive, and constant updates. Amazing team. Has made my life so much easier.
cons: That the calendar goes back to full calendar when working on it.

review_title: Have had the best experience using the software and the support team are just amazing
description: The support team have been absolutely amazing. We are new to hotel management and without this software or their help I'd hate to think were we'd be.
author: Natasha F.
pros: Love this software, everything is seamless and easy to use. Help is always available.
cons: Haven't found a con yet, and don't think we will ;-)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Thanks for taking the leap to create and develop Resly, it’s the answer to my prayers.
author: Andrea R.
pros: I had very little hesitation moving to Resly, and I am now sleeping better and enjoying Management Rights so much more, confident in the fact that the system works! Resly is intuitive and very simple to use. My offsite apartments are perfectly catered for and the best part for me is being able to view Resly anywhere – on my desktop, tablet, phone and even my smart Refrigerator! I can be anywhere in the world and keep my finger on the pulse. Not to mention the support. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] are awesome. They have always responded quickly and consistently, no matter how dumb the question they have fixed all my issues with enthusiasm and respect. They are constantly updating features that make Resly unequivocally the best product on the market.
cons: Nothing I can think of, it ticks all the boxes

author: Shirley D.
pros: Always updated with new & exciting features. Very easy to use & support is amazing.Help is just a call away. Very prompt & professional at all times.
cons: Not that I am aware of. This software certainly covers all my needs with ease.

review_title: The PMS kid on the block
description: It streamlines our current operation. It is cloud based, so no longer waiting for the computer. I prefer Apple over a PC, so now I can use on the 2 computers we have, rather than buying another.
author: Paul H.
pros: The system is easy to use, and it just makes sense. The support is second to none.The are a couple of guys giving it a go, and have done a fantastic job. They are happy to take suggestions on board, and implement these changes often immediatley.Highly recommend.
cons: None as of yet. When there is a problem, you contact support, and any changes are made.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Had a very good experience so far, the team at Resly was very responsive especially during change over period in difficult circumstances.
author: Gerhard L.
pros: Cloud Based mean I can get away from the desk, respond to changes quicker and spend more time on the guests.
cons: Lacks a few merge field options. Bit pricey.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We are extremely satisfied with Resly, the ease of operation and the support is excellent.
author: Maryann S.
pros: The ease of use of the system and being able to discuss options/changes direct with the developer
cons: The features that were missing from the system are being updated by the developers and we are extremely happy with their attention to detail.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Excellent for the Accommodation industry, easily compares to other Trust Account Software on the market.
author: Mandy L.
pros: I love the interface, it's easy to understand and navigate. Having multiple windows open assists in time efficiency, and the option to use the program on any laptop or computer is a big plus.
cons: Getting used to the number of pop-ups for printing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
